pageDescription: Get in touch with Holtzweb. Server, website, networking, or just a conversation. Let's talk about your infrastructure.
heading: Ask Me Anything.
subHeading: I read every message — I'll read what you wrote and respond as soon as I lay eyes on it.

contactMethods.label: Email
contactMethods.note: Typically responds within a few hours

form.heading: What's going on?

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Tell me what's going on. The more detail the better — I actually read these.

form.confirmationText: You will get an email reply, affirming receipt.
form.successMessage: Message sent! We'll be in touch shortly.
form.errorFallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.networkError: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
